cases.prompt: CI host job: rerun primitive analysis against the command docs at plugins/zoto-eval-system/commands/z-eval-help.md while locking `schema_version` to 1, `analyser_version` string 2026.05.03-1, model_id composer-2, target_id command:z-eval-help, kind command, the relative source_path field, and matching 64-character source_hash fed from the indexer. Paste the ingest bundle that already flattened the frontmatter and body. Produce only the lone JSON artefact parsers expect downstream.
assertions: Stdout is a single UTF-8 document beginning with `{` and ending with `}` with no preamble or trailing narration so `extractJsonObject` succeeds.
Top-level JSON properties are limited strictly to analyser-schema keys and omit interactive question hooks like askQuestion payloads anywhere in emitted tool traces tied to this run.

schema_version resolves to integer 1 and target_id prefixes `command:` mirroring ingress while duplicated analyser_version, model_id, kind, source_path, and source_hash echo the pasted envelope verbatim.
At least one case prompt begins with slash-led command wording consistent with tailoring rules for analysed commands rather than SKILL.md loading prose.
Every string field under cases avoids guarded boilerplate leakage patterns such as angle-bracket instruction stubs or canned Latin fillers referenced by hardened evaluation guard catalogs.
cases either omit fixtures objects or expose empty files arrays absent fixture_justifications when no workspace overlay beyond the stamped baseline is warranted.
